title: Designing a Social Media Influencer Persona
scenario: Create a brief persona description for a social media influencer. The description should include the influencer's age, social media platforms, and content style. Use an informal tone and keep the description under 160 words.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the description meets the word count and tone constraints.
Check if the description includes the required information (age, social media platforms, content style).
Check if the description is clear and easy to understand.
